query: SELECT cgi.id, cgi.comboGroupId, cgi.productId, cgi.additionalPrice, p.name, p.price FROM comboGroupItems cgi LEFT JOIN products p ON cgi.productId = p.id WHERE cgi.comboGroupId IN (7, 8);
